reviews.review_description: This is crap. Not able to create an account due to ssl failure…. Dont buy it!
This game is amazing! everybody should try it, it is possible to feel like a dentist in a real situation and it is very funny to play! Totally recommend it!
I purchased this game trying to log in and keeps saying can’t connect to ssl connection .
When I go to create an account, I’m getting an SSL error ￼

reviews.review_title: Unable to create account in game
reviews.review_description: I launch the game but then unable to create an account. I get SSL error. Please fix.
I am trying to sign in I don’t know what I am doing wrong????

developer_response.body: Our team tested the registration method and everything  ok, could you provide more information about your problem or if you have already managed to register?

reviews.review_description: This game is so confusing, hard and buggy because first if you don't or can't be bother to listen to the npcs there's no option to see what your supposed to do second I put easy difficulty and was still so hard and third your supposed to use a Pacific hand for each item but I had 3 fingers on my right hand IRL which made it a bit hard so completely waste of money and when I was doing what I supposed to do it wouldn't work at all

developer_response.body: Thank you for your feedback. We're sorry to hear that your experience was not as expected. We understand that the dental simulator can be challenging, especially for those unfamiliar with dental techniques and instruments. For guidance on the steps to complete each mission, please follow the panel located on the right side after entering treatment mode—this will provide a clear sequence of tasks. Regarding the difficulty setting, we're reviewing the balance to ensure that 'easy' mode truly provides a more accessible experience. We also hear your concerns about hand controls, and our team is working on improvements to make them more intuitive and inclusive. We appreciate your input and are committed to bringing updates that will make the game more enjoyable and accessible for everyone
